title: Aitareya Upanishad III: All Is Brahman
description: From the Aitareya Upanishad III — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Aitareya Upanishad III — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: He who is the supporter of the world, all-powerful, who has thrown light on his own form by his own light, by him are sun and moon, fire and lightning illumined.
